---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new resource, section, or enhancement to the library
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, needs-discussion
assignees: lawie1425
---

## ✨ Feature Summary

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## 🎯 Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who would benefit from it? -->
<!-- Example: "As a student looking for French-language resources, I cannot find any translated materials in the library." -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented. -->
<!-- Be as specific as possible: what files would change? What new files would be added? -->

## 📁 Affected Areas

- [ ] `resources/index.md` — Master index update
- [ ] `resources/computing/` — Computing section
- [ ] `resources/sciences/` — Sciences section
- [ ] `resources/humanities/` — Humanities section
- [ ] `resources/localization/` — Localization/translation
- [ ] `docs/` — Documentation
- [ ] `.github/` — GitHub configuration
- [ ] Other: <!-- specify -->

## 🌍 Impact & Audience

<!-- Who would benefit from this feature? How many users does it affect? -->
<!-- Example: "This would benefit French-speaking students in West Africa." -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why is your proposed solution better? -->

## 📚 References / Examples

<!-- Links to similar features in other projects, or relevant resources. -->

## 🗓️ Priority

- [ ] 🔴 High — Blocking core functionality
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — Important improvement
- [ ] 🟢 Low — Nice to have

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria

<!-- How will we know this feature is complete? Define clear, testable criteria. -->
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 💬 Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, mockups, or examples. -->

> 💬 Large features should be discussed here before work begins.
